It's a key indicator of ongoing efforts to bridge the digital divide and foster economic growth.

Text:
Zimbabwe just got a massive upgrade to its digital backbone! 🇿🇼

Powertel and Paratus Zimbabwe have officially switched on a brand new digital highway, marking a significant step forward for connectivity across the nation. This new infrastructure promises to boost internet access and digital services, opening up new possibilities for businesses and individuals alike.

It's a crucial development for a country rapidly embracing the digital age, connecting more communities and empowering future growth.
